/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-stats-test-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-test-default.so "CMakeFiles/stats-test.dir/test/average-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/stats-test.dir/test/basic-data-calculators-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/stats-test.dir/test/double-probe-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/stats-test.dir/test/histogram-test-suite.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed
